name: conan-fda-orchestrator
description: Conan v3 — FDA + EDGAR signal orchestrator. Bundles 4 sub-agent skills (literature, competitive landscape, regulatory history, options microstructure) and 8 MCP servers (pubmed, biorxiv, clinicaltrials, openfda, fda-adcomm, polygon, internal-rag, compute) used by the Anthropic API SDK orchestrator runtime and the Cowork bulk path.
author: Conan
